correctionPrefix: If anything is missing or incorrect,

createdViewDraftReport: View draft report (opens in new tab)
deleteBodyGuidance: You'll be able to start creating the report again from your reports page.
deleteBodyWarning: Confirm that you want to delete this report. This action cannot be undone.
detailHeading: Your summary log data for {{ periodLabel }}
emptyState: There are no reporting periods with data.
freeErrorExceedsTotal: Enter a number less than the total number of {{noteTypePlural}} you issued in this period
freeErrorFormat: Enter a value in digits, using a decimal point if needed
freeErrorInteger: Enter a whole number without decimal places
freeErrorNegative: Enter a tonnage of 0 or more
freeErrorRequired: Enter the total tonnage of free {{noteTypePlural}}, even if zero
freeHeading: What is the total tonnage of {{noteTypePlural}} you issued for free in {{periodLabel}}?
freeHint: For example, you may have issued {{noteTypePlural}} to your own company for no charge.
freeInputHint: Total tonnage should be a whole number without decimal numbers
freeInputLabel: Enter total tonnage of {{noteTypePlural}} issued for free
heading: Reports
lastUploadedAt: Your most recent summary log was uploaded at {{ time }} on {{ date }}.
noteSummaryErrorDecimalPlaces: Total revenue should only have 2 digits after the decimal point
noteSummaryErrorFormat: Enter the total revenue in digits, using a decimal point if needed
noteSummaryErrorRequired: Enter the total revenue of {{noteTypePlural}} issued
noteSummaryRevenueHint: Total revenue should be in pounds and pence
noteSummaryRevenueLabel: Enter total revenue of {{noteTypePlural}}, excluding VAT
overviewIntro: The following is an overview of your summary log data for {{ periodLabel }}. Only the data that will appear in your report is shown here.
submitDeclarationItem1: you are an approved person who is eligible to submit reports on behalf of your business
submitDeclarationItem2: the information you are providing is as accurate as reasonably possible
submitDeclarationItem3: you understand that submission of false or misleading information may result in enforcement action
submitDeclarationText: By submitting this report to your regulator you confirm that:
submitFreeLabel: Total tonnage of {{noteTypePlural}} issued for free
submitFreeTonnageNote: (These are not included in the average price per tonne calculation)
submitInsetText: If any of the following information is incorrect you will need to delete this report and create a new one.
submitTotalTonnageReceivedNotRecycled: Total tonnage received but not recycled
submittedFutureChangesGuidance: If future changes to your summary log affect the data you have submitted, you may need to submit an updated report for this period.
submittedViewReport: View report (Opens in a new tab)
supportingInformationError: Supporting information must be 2,000 characters or fewer
supportingInformationHeading: Add supporting information for your regulator (optional)
supportingInformationHint: Include any extra information you think your regulator will find useful.
tonnageNotRecycledErrorDecimalPlaces: Total tonnage should only have two digits after the decimal point

tonnageNotRecycledErrorNegative: Enter a tonnage of 0 or more
tonnageNotRecycledErrorRequired: Enter the total tonnage of packaging waste received but not recycled
tonnageNotRecycledHeading: How many tonnes of {{material}} packaging waste did you receive in {{periodLabel}} but not recycle?
tonnageNotRecycledHint: Only include packaging waste that is still on the site, not waste that has been sent on.
tonnageReceivedNotExportedHeading: Packaging waste received but not exported
tonnageReceivedNotExportedIntro: This data comes from section 1 of your summary log.
tonnageRecycledErrorDecimalPlaces: Total tonnage should only have two digits after the decimal point
tonnageRecycledErrorFormat: Enter the total tonnage in digits, using a decimal point if needed
tonnageRecycledErrorNegative: Enter a tonnage of 0 or more
tonnageRecycledErrorRequired: Enter the total tonnage of packaging waste recycled
tonnageRecycledHeading: How many tonnes of {{material}} packaging waste did you recycle in {{periodLabel}}?
tonnageRecycledHint: This total may differ from the {{periodLabel}} data in Section 1 of your summary log if any packaging waste received in previous months was put into your machines during {{periodLabel}}.
tonnageRefusedOrStoppedHeading: Packaging waste refused or stopped during export
tonnageRefusedOrStoppedIntro: The data comes from sections 1 and 2 of your summary log.
tonnageSentOnToExporters: Total tonnage sent on to exporters
tonnageSentOnToOtherSites: Total tonnage sent on to other sites or facilities
tonnageSentOnToReprocessors: Total tonnage sent on to reprocessors
